questions.question:
Consider the following relational query on the above database:

SELECT S.name FROM Suppliers S 
Where S.sid NOT IN (SELECT C.sid FROM Catalog C
WHERE C.pid NOT IN (SELECT P.pid FROM Parts P WHERE P.color <>'blue'))


ISRO2015-22
options: Find the names of all suppliers who have supplied non-blue part.
Find the names of all suppliers who have not supplied non-blue part.
Find the names of all suppliers who have supplied only non-blue parts
Find the names of all suppliers who have not supplied only non-blue part.
